title: narcissus hispanicus var. bujei
intro: Narcissus hispanicus var. bujei, also known as the Spanish narcissus, is a type of wild daffodil native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective against infections and wounds. The health benefits of Narcissus hispanicus var. bujei include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
